close_reason: Updated Item visibility tests to use fixed timestamps with :now parameter
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/test/bedrock/job_queue/store_test.exs`

## Tests to Update (lines 83-104)

### 1. "items with past vesting_time and no lease are visible" (lines 84-88)
```elixir
# Current
past = System.system_time(:millisecond) - 1000
item = Item.new("queue", "topic", %{}, vesting_time: past)
assert Item.visible?(item)

# Should be
now = 10_000
item = Item.new("queue", "topic", %{}, vesting_time: 9_000)
assert Item.visible?(item, now)
```

### 2. "items with future vesting_time are not visible" (lines 91-95)
```elixir
# Current  
future = System.system_time(:millisecond) + 10_000
item = Item.new("queue", "topic", %{}, vesting_time: future)
refute Item.visible?(item)

# Should be
now = 10_000
item = Item.new("queue", "topic", %{}, vesting_time: 20_000)
refute Item.visible?(item, now)
```

### 3. "items with lease are not visible" (lines 98-102)
```elixir
# Current
past = System.system_time(:millisecond) - 1000
item = %{Item.new("queue", "topic", %{}, vesting_time: past) | lease_id: <<1, 2, 3>>}
refute Item.visible?(item)

# Should be
now = 10_000
item = %{Item.new("queue", "topic", %{}, vesting_time: 9_000) | lease_id: <<1, 2, 3>>}
refute Item.visible?(item, now)
```

## Principle
Use fixed timestamp values instead of relative wall-clock time.
title: Update store_test.exs Item visibility tests
